models.Category: A grouping label used to organize items on the registry (e.g., Baby Clothing, Feeding).
models.Item: A specific item the ministry is requesting donations of, with a quantity needed, quantity already claimed, optional brand/store preference, and a category.
models.Registry: Top-level configuration for the registry, including drop-off instructions shown to donors after claiming an item.

relationships: Item belongs to a Category via categoryId
An Item is considered fully claimed when quantityClaimed >= quantityNeeded — these are hidden from the public registry

quotes.text: We can do no great things, only small things with great love.
Give something, however small, to the one in need. For it is not small to one who has nothing.
It is not how much we do, but how much love we put in the doing.
The measure of love is to love without measure.
Love is a fruit in season at all times, and within reach of every hand.
We ourselves feel that what we are doing is just a drop in the ocean. But the ocean would be less because of that missing drop.

registry.dropOffInstructions: Please drop off your donation at Grace Community Church, 4820 Maple Ridge Blvd, Room 112. Drop-off hours are Tuesday and Thursday 10am–2pm, and Sunday 9am–noon. Items should be new or gently used and in their original packaging if possible. If you have questions, email donations@walkingwithmoms.org.

items.name: Onesies (0–3 Month)
items.description: Short and long sleeve newborn onesies in any color or pattern.

items.name: Footed Sleepers (3–6 Month)
items.description: Warm footed pajamas, zipper closure preferred for easy nighttime changes.

items.name: Newborn Hat & Mitten Set
items.description: Soft knit hat and mittens for a newborn — helps regulate temperature in the first weeks.

items.name: Baby Bottles (Set of 4)
items.description: Slow-flow nipple bottles suitable for newborns. Great for supplementing or bottle feeding.

items.name: Burp Cloths (Set of 5+)
items.description: Absorbent muslin or terry cloth burp cloths. The more the better!

items.name: Nursing Cover
items.description: A lightweight, breathable nursing cover for use at home or out in public.

items.name: Swaddle Blankets (Set of 3)
items.description: Stretchy muslin swaddle blankets — excellent for swaddling, nursing cover, or tummy time mat.

items.name: White Noise Machine
items.description: Portable sound machine to help baby sleep through household noise. Rechargeable preferred.

items.name: Baby Wash & Lotion Set
items.description: Gentle, fragrance-free wash and lotion for newborn skin. Hypoallergenic formulas preferred.
items.brandPreference: Cetaphil Baby or Burt's Bees Baby

items.name: Baby Nail Kit
items.description: Safe nail file and trimmer set for newborns. Tiny nails are sharper than they look!

items.name: Postpartum Recovery Kit
items.description: Includes perineal spray, pads, and sitz bath soak to support mom's recovery after delivery.

items.name: Nursing Pads (Disposable, Box of 60)
items.description: Disposable nursing pads to prevent leakage during the early weeks of breastfeeding.
